stories.title: Open Championship Draw Revealed — McIlroy Gets Afternoon Start, Scheffler With DeChambeau

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Open Championship R1 groups are SET.

McIlroy with Schauffele + Fitzpatrick (afternoon)
Scheffler with DeChambeau + Hatton (morning)
Spieth with Fleetwood + Rahm
Lowry with Koepka + Aaron Rai

Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Let's go. #TheOpen

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Joe Dean shot 2-under 68 at Royal Birkdale today to win the Last Chance Qualifier and earn the final spot in The Open.

Birdied 7, birdied 11, eagled 14.

That's how you punch a ticket. #TheOpen

article.headline: Open Championship R1 Groups: McIlroy With Schauffele and Fitzpatrick, Scheffler With DeChambeau

stories.title: Scheffler Missed Cut at Scottish — Enters Open Championship With Extra Prep Time

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler missed the cut at the Genesis Scottish Open.

First missed cut in nearly four years. Streak: 78 events (5th all-time).

He arrives at Royal Birkdale as defending Open champion with a point to prove. #TheOpen

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Defending Open champion. 78-event made-cut streak just ended.

Scottie Scheffler has skipped his final links warmup before Birkdale.

Is that a concern or does extra course time help him? Debate. #TheOpen

article.headline: Scottie Scheffler Missed the Cut at the Scottish Open — Here's What It Means for His Open Defense

stories.title: Tommy Fleetwood's Hometown Open — Southport Native Eyes First Major at Birkdale

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Tommy Fleetwood grew up in Southport. He used to climb fences to play Royal Birkdale as a kid.

This week, he tees off there in the Open Championship.

The whole town is watching. First Englishman to win The Open since Faldo 1992? #TheOpen

article.headline: Tommy Fleetwood's Once-in-a-Career Chance: The Open Championship at the Course He Played as a Kid

stories.title: LIV Golf Now Running on Loans — CEO Won't Guarantee Remaining Events

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
New: LIV Golf isn't being funded by PIF anymore — it's borrowing from them.

A debenture (secured loan) was filed between LIV and PIF on June 4.

When CNBC asked the CEO if all 4 remaining events would be played, he wouldn't say yes.

#LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Golf Is Running on Loans Now — And the CEO Won't Promise All 4 Remaining Events Happen

stories.title: Open Championship Preview — Royal Birkdale, 156 Players, Scheffler and McIlroy Co-Favorites

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale starts Thursday.

Scheffler is defending — first back-to-back Open winner since Tiger would be historic.
McIlroy has 7 majors and a career Grand Slam. He wants No. 8.
Rai won the PGA two months ago.

This one is stacked. #TheOpen

article.headline: 2026 Open Championship Preview: Scheffler Defends, McIlroy Hunts History, Rai Is the Wild Card
